positive: An ethereal, highly stylized cosmic forest scene, viewed top-down, featuring geometric trees with bioluminescent white and gold canopies, growing on a deep indigo velvet background. The scene is rendered in a clean linework style mixed with detailed watercolor gradients. Include repeating constellations patterns and stylized, symmetrical flora motifs surrounding a central glowing portal effect. The overall composition must be suitable for seamless apparel printing, using strong negative space, high contrast, and a limited, harmonious color palette of teal, gold, indigo, and cream. Studio lighting, perfect symmetry, ornate pattern design, mystical, maximalism, graphic illustration.
negative: blurry, low detail, fuzzy, text, logo, watermark, signature, noisy, artifacts, amateur, ugly, poor composition, low contrast, out of focus
